---
title: "Modelling Assignment"
author: "Leilanie Coker"
date: "2026-03-21"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## Load Libraries

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(caret)
library(pROC)
library(randomForest)
library(rpart)
library(rpart.plot)
```

# Load and Clean Data
```{r}
# Load data
qal <- read_csv("QAL Performance for MSBA.csv")

# Filter Ax leads, remove rows with no outcome, create binary target
qal_clean <- qal |>
  filter(solution_rollup != "Ax") |>
  filter(!is.na(next_stage__c)) |>
  mutate(
    progressed = if_else(next_stage__c %in% c("SQL", "SQO", "Won"), 1L, 0L)
  )

# Treat "Not Enough Info Found" as missing
qal_clean <- qal_clean |>
  mutate(
    `acct primary site function` = na_if(`acct primary site function`, "Not Enough Info Found"),
    `acct manufacturing model`   = na_if(`acct manufacturing model`, "Not Enough Info Found")
  )

# Create date, title flag, seniority, and functional area columns
qal_clean <- qal_clean |>
  mutate(
    title_missing  = if_else(is.na(`contact/lead title`), 1L, 0L),
    cohort_year    = year(`qal cohort date`),
    cohort_quarter = quarter(`qal cohort date`),
    cohort_month   = month(`qal cohort date`),
    title_lower    = str_to_lower(`contact/lead title`),
    seniority = case_when(
      is.na(title_lower) ~ "Unknown",
      str_detect(title_lower, "\\bceo\\b|\\bcoo\\b|\\bcfo\\b|\\bcto\\b|\\bcqo\\b|\\bchief\\b|\\bpresident\\b|\\bowner\\b|\\bfounder\\b") ~ "C-Level",
      str_detect(title_lower, "\\bvp\\b|\\bvice president\\b") ~ "VP",
      str_detect(title_lower, "\\bdirector\\b") ~ "Director",
      str_detect(title_lower, "\\bmanager\\b|\\bmanagement\\b") ~ "Manager",
      str_detect(title_lower, "\\bsenior\\b|\\bsr\\.?\\b|\\blead\\b|\\bprincipal\\b") ~ "Senior Individual Contributor",
      str_detect(title_lower, "\\bengineer\\b|\\bscientist\\b|\\banalyst\\b|\\bspecialist\\b|\\bcoordinator\\b|\\bconsultant\\b|\\bassociate\\b") ~ "Individual Contributor",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    func_quality       = if_else(str_detect(title_lower, "quality|qa\\b|qc\\b|qms|compliance|assurance"), 1L, 0L, missing = 0L),
    func_regulatory    = if_else(str_detect(title_lower, "regulat|ra\\b|affairs|submission"), 1L, 0L, missing = 0L),
    func_manufacturing = if_else(str_detect(title_lower, "manufactur|production|process|plant|operations|supply chain|supply\\b"), 1L, 0L, missing = 0L),
    func_rd            = if_else(str_detect(title_lower, "research|r&d|development|scientific|science|clinical"), 1L, 0L, missing = 0L),
    func_it            = if_else(str_detect(title_lower, "\\bit\\b|information tech|systems|software|digital|data|eqms|erp"), 1L, 0L, missing = 0L),
    func_area = case_when(
      is.na(title_lower)                           ~ "Unknown",
      func_manufacturing == 1 & func_quality == 0 ~ "Operations/Manufacturing",
      func_quality == 1 & func_regulatory == 1     ~ "Quality & Regulatory",
      func_quality == 1                            ~ "Quality",
      func_regulatory == 1                         ~ "Regulatory",
      func_it == 1                                 ~ "IT/Systems",
      func_rd == 1                                 ~ "R&D",
      func_manufacturing == 1                      ~ "Operations/Manufacturing",
      TRUE                                         ~ "Other/Unknown"
    )
  )
```

# Data Prep
```{r}
# Filter to Mx only and select modeling columns
mx <- qal_clean |>
  filter(solution_rollup == "Mx") |>
  select(
    progressed,
    acct_industry  = `acct target industry`,
    acct_mfg_model = `acct manufacturing model`,
    acct_tier      = `acct tier rollup`,
    acct_territory = `acct territory rollup`,
    priority       = `Priority`,
    channel        = `last tactic campaign channel`,
    seniority,
    func_area,
    title_missing,
    cohort_year,
    cohort_quarter
  ) |>
  mutate(across(where(is.character), ~replace_na(., "Unknown"))) |>
  mutate(
    progressed     = factor(progressed, levels = c(0, 1), labels = c("No", "Yes")),
    across(where(is.character), as.factor),
    cohort_year    = as.factor(cohort_year),
    cohort_quarter = as.factor(cohort_quarter)
  )

# Check dimensions and class balance
dim(mx)
table(mx$progressed)
prop.table(table(mx$progressed))
```
# Benchmark
```{r}
# Always predicting "No" to find accuracy floor
benchmark_acc <- mean(mx$progressed == "No")
benchmark_acc
```
# Train / Test Split
```{r}
set.seed(42)

train_idx <- createDataPartition(mx$progressed, p = 0.8, list = FALSE)
train <- mx[train_idx, ]
test  <- mx[-train_idx, ]
```

# CV Setup
```{r}
ctrl <- trainControl(
  method          = "cv",
  number          = 5,
  classProbs      = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final"
)
```

# Logistic Regression Model
```{r}
set.seed(42)
lr_model <- train(
  progressed ~ .,
  data      = train,
  method    = "glm",
  family    = "binomial",
  trControl = ctrl,
  metric    = "ROC"
)

lr_model
summary(lr_model$finalModel)

lr_preds <- predict(lr_model, test)
lr_probs <- predict(lr_model, test, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]

confusionMatrix(lr_preds, test$progressed, positive = "Yes")
roc(test$progressed, lr_probs, levels = c("No", "Yes")) |> auc()
```
# Decision Tree

```{r}
set.seed(42)
dt_model <- train(
  progressed ~ .,
  data       = train,
  method     = "rpart",
  trControl  = ctrl,
  metric     = "ROC",
  tuneLength = 10
)

dt_model
plot(dt_model)

rpart.plot(dt_model$finalModel, type = 4, extra = 101, under = TRUE,
           cex = 0.7, main = "Decision Tree for Mx Conversion")

dt_preds <- predict(dt_model, test)
dt_probs <- predict(dt_model, test, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]

confusionMatrix(dt_preds, test$progressed, positive = "Yes")
roc(test$progressed, dt_probs, levels = c("No", "Yes")) |> auc()

varImp(dt_model)
```

# Random Forest

```{r}
set.seed(42)
rf_model <- train(
  progressed ~ .,
  data       = train,
  method     = "rf",
  trControl  = ctrl,
  metric     = "ROC",
  tuneLength = 5,
  importance = TRUE
)

rf_model
plot(rf_model)

rf_preds <- predict(rf_model, test)
rf_probs <- predict(rf_model, test, type = "prob")[, "Yes"]

confusionMatrix(rf_preds, test$progressed, positive = "Yes")
roc(test$progressed, rf_probs, levels = c("No", "Yes")) |> auc()

varImp(rf_model) |> plot(main = "Random Forest: Variable Importance for Mx Conversion")
```
# Model Comparison

```{r}
results <- resamples(list(
  Logistic_Regression = lr_model,
  Decision_Tree       = dt_model,
  Random_Forest       = rf_model
))

summary(results)
bwplot(results, metric = "ROC", main = "Cross-Validated AUC by Model")
```
# ROC Curves

```{r}
roc_lr <- roc(test$progressed, lr_probs, levels = c("No", "Yes"), quiet = TRUE)
roc_dt <- roc(test$progressed, dt_probs, levels = c("No", "Yes"), quiet = TRUE)
roc_rf <- roc(test$progressed, rf_probs, levels = c("No", "Yes"), quiet = TRUE)

plot(roc_lr, col = "steelblue",  lwd = 2, main = "ROC Curves: Mx Conversion Models")
plot(roc_dt, col = "darkorange", lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
plot(roc_rf, col = "darkgreen",  lwd = 2, add = TRUE)
legend("bottomright",
       legend = c(
         paste0("Logistic Regression (AUC = ", round(auc(roc_lr), 3), ")"),
         paste0("Decision Tree (AUC = ",        round(auc(roc_dt), 3), ")"),
         paste0("Random Forest (AUC = ",        round(auc(roc_rf), 3), ")")
       ),
       col = c("steelblue", "darkorange", "darkgreen"),
       lwd = 2)
```
# Feature Importance Table

```{r}
importance(rf_model$finalModel) |>
  as.data.frame() |>
  rownames_to_column("feature") |>
  arrange(desc(MeanDecreaseAccuracy)) |>
  head(10)
```

# Business Validation

```{r}
# Top industry + seniority combinations for Mx
qal_clean |>
  filter(solution_rollup == "Mx",
         !is.na(`acct target industry`),
         `acct target industry` != "Unknown",
         seniority != "Unknown") |>
  group_by(`acct target industry`, seniority) |>
  summarise(n = n(), conv_rate = mean(progressed), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(n >= 20) |>
  arrange(desc(conv_rate)) |>
  head(10)

# Top manufacturing model + tier combinations for Mx
qal_clean |>
  filter(solution_rollup == "Mx",
         !is.na(`acct manufacturing model`),
         !is.na(`acct tier rollup`)) |>
  group_by(`acct manufacturing model`, `acct tier rollup`) |>
  summarise(n = n(), conv_rate = mean(progressed), .groups = "drop") |>
  filter(n >= 20) |>
  arrange(desc(conv_rate)) |>
  head(10)
```
